generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M) for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first vertical axis."
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gear transmission system comprising a standard gearbox followed by a cycloidal gearbox that reduces gear ratio and transmits torque (τ_G) to the output axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The final stage of the transmission providing precise torque output (τ_out) with minimal backlash and positional uncertainty, constrained by a safety cell limiting working range to ±90° and maximum speed of 75°/s."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution angular position feedback sensor mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for real-time angular position measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox to improve positional uncertainty estimation by comparing encoder readings and reducing backlash effects."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionData
]

instance SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller capturing real-time data via MQTT including input current (I_M), output angle, torque, angular velocity, and acceleration parameters."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData, AngularPositionData, MotorTorqueData, AngularVelocityData, DerivedAccelerationData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueData
]

instance DerivedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueData, CycloidalGearbox
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model in MATLAB Simulink implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction behavior for the permanent magnet synchronous motor-gearbox system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model in MATLAB Simulink implementing Stribeck friction behavior to account for velocity-dependent friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model in MATLAB Simulink implementing LuGre friction model for comprehensive friction characterization including static, kinetic, and viscous components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance StructuralBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the robot's first axis: Axis → Motor → GearTransmissionSystem → CycloidalGearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagramTool
]

instance StructuralIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram providing detailed structural visualization of the motor-gearbox subsystem interactions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagramTool
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current measurements (I_M) captured by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor torque measurements (τ_M) captured by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular velocity measurements (ω) captured by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output data generated by friction-included models for comparison with live measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox torque measurements (τ_G) calculated from motor torque and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GearTransmissionSystem
]

instance MeasuredOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived output torque measurements (τ_out) from cycloidal gearbox calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedOutputTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CycloidalGearbox
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time acceleration measurements derived from velocity and torque data via CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SiemensSinumerik840DCNCController
]

instance FrictionLossData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated friction loss data combining static, kinetic, and viscous friction components for motion accuracy analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorTorqueData, MeasuredGearboxTorqueData, SimulatedMotorOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagramTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool for creating SysML Block Definition Diagrams to model the structural composition of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralBDD, StructuralIBD
]

instance MathWorksMATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment for implementing and validating friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) in the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming protocol for transmitting sensor data (motor current, torque, velocity) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredMotorTorqueData, MeasuredAngularVelocityData, MeasuredAccelerationData
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework integrating robot structural and behavioral models (SysML BDD/IBD) with operational data for traceability and system health monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralBDD, StructuralIBD, FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance FrictionAnalysisDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool aggregating live data traces (torque/velocity deviations) for monitoring system health and triggering maintenance actions."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossData
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox using white-box (analytical models) and black-box (data-driven) approaches."
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic updates to friction models enabling adaptive control algorithms for improved robot motion accuracy by comparing simulated (frictionless vs. friction-included) and measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterOptimizationAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live data (motor current, torque, angular velocity) and model outputs for operational monitoring and decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwarenessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of structural (gearbox/motor) and behavioral (friction) models to enable continuous, multi-physics-aware friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralBehavioralCorrelationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of static friction losses and their impact on motion accuracy through comparison of measured and simulated data."
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of kinetic friction losses and their velocity-dependent characteristics for predictive maintenance planning."
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of viscous friction losses and their temperature-dependent behavior for system health monitoring."
]

instance StructuralBehavioralCorrelationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Correlation between structural gearbox characteristics and behavioral friction models to identify root causes of motion deviations."
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction model updates to maintain motion accuracy within specified tolerances (±0.1mm positional accuracy)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual trigger for maintenance actions based on detected friction anomalies exceeding predefined thresholds in the dashboard visualization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PositionalAccuracyDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of positional accuracy metrics (≤0.1mm) with real-time comparison against target specifications for motion quality assessment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time** with:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, angular velocity) is streamed at **high temporal resolution** (implied by live operational data requirements).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are dynamically refined during operation, with updates triggered by deviations between simulated and measured data (e.g., via **MQTT** or model-based processing).
  - **Synchronization**: The digital shadow processes data in near-real-time to support **continuous identification** of friction parameters, ensuring alignment with operational demands."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A single, purpose-driven digital shadow for the robot’s first axis, integrating:
    - **Physical System**: The motor-gearbox subsystem with embedded sensors.
    - **Virtual Models**: Structural (SysML) and behavioral (Simulink) models.
    - **Data Processing**: Simulation and calculation models (e.g., friction models) linked to live data via MQTT.
  - **No External DTs**: The scope is limited to the first axis; no horizontal integration with other robots or systems is described."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed (Ideal)**: Structural models (SysML Block Definition Diagrams) describe the robot’s ideal configuration and mechanical components.
  - **As Operated**: Real-time data traces (sensor inputs, derived parameters) are captured during robot operation to detect friction-induced deviations.
  - **Continuous Improvement**: The digital shadow enables **post-operation analysis** of friction models, facilitating iterative updates to control algorithms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are validated against live sensor data to verify friction parameter accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The digital shadow uses **traceability** (metadata linking data to sources/models) to identify deviations (e.g., friction-induced errors) and validate model outputs.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Continuous comparison of simulated vs. measured data (e.g., torque/velocity traces) ensures model validity during operation.
  - **Parameter Identification**: White-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models are dynamically refined to minimize discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time data streaming between sensors, CNC controller, and digital shadow.
  - **SysML Models**: Structured as SysML Block Definition Diagrams (BDD) and Internal Block Diagrams (IBD) for robot subsystem modeling.
  - **Simulink Integration**: Simulation models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous friction) are executed in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink to process data traces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML Standard**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot subsystem.
  - **MQTT Standard**: For real-time data communication.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For integrating robot models and operational data into a unified framework (though specific AAS standards are not detailed)."
]
